      "source": [
        "<a href=\"https://colab.research.google.com/github/MythiliSudarsan/Data-AI-ML-Practice/blob/main/Data_Quality_Report.md\" target=\"_parent\"><img src=\"https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg\" alt=\"Open In Colab\"/></a>"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": null,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "cB0OC_qgR4vQ"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "# Data Quality Report\n",
        "\n",
        "## 1. Missing Values\n",
        "- **Billing Table**\n",
        "  - `approved_amount`: Missing values detected\n",
        "  - `payment_days`: Missing values detected\n",
        "- **Patients Table**\n",
        "  - No missing values in demographic fields\n",
        "- **Visits Table**\n",
        "  - No missing values in `length_of_stay_hours`\n",
        "\n",
        "**Interpretation:** Missingness is concentrated in billing, likely due to incomplete claim approvals or delayed payments.\n",
        "\n",
        "---\n",
        "\n",
        "## 2. Invalid Entries\n",
        "- **Length of Stay Hours:** No negative or zero values found\n",
        "- **Payment Days:** No invalid entries detected\n",
        "- **Age:** All values within expected range\n",
        "\n",
        "**Interpretation:** Data entry quality is strong; no systemic invalid values.\n",
        "\n",
        "---\n",
        "\n",
        "## 3. Outliers\n",
        "- **Billed Amount:** Extreme high values detected\n",
        "- **Payment Days:** Long delays identified\n",
        "- **Length of Stay Hours:** ICU and Oncology show longer stays\n",
        "\n",
        "**Visualization:** Include boxplots for billed amount, payment days, and stay hours.\n",
        "\n",
        "**Interpretation:** Outliers reflect real operational variation (e.g., complex cases, delayed insurer payments).\n",
        "\n",
        "---\n",
        "\n",
        "## 4. Provider Rejection Rates\n",
        "| Insurance Provider | Rejection Rate |\n",
        "|--------------------|----------------|\n",
        "| CareOne            | 14.9%          |\n",
        "| HealthPlus         | 15.0%          |\n",
        "| MediCareX          | 15.2%          |\n",
        "| SecureLife         | 15.7%          |\n",
        "\n",
        "**Interpretation:** SecureLife shows the highest rejection rate, potentially impacting hospital cash flow. CareOne has the lowest, suggesting smoother claim approvals.\n",
        "\n",
        "---\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "## 5. Distributions\n",
        "- **Department vs Length of Stay:** ICU/Oncology longer stays\n",
        "- **Visit Type:** Balanced distribution across emergency, routine, follow‑up\n",
        "- **Insurance Provider vs Claim Status:** SecureLife higher rejection share\n",
        "- **City:** Patient volumes vary by city\n",
        "- **Age:** Skew toward middle‑aged patients\n",
        "- **Risk Score:** Normal distribution with tail risks\n",
        "\n",
        "**Visualization:** Include histograms and countplots for each distribution.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 1000
        },
        "id": "lV2rn32FOtQa",
        "outputId": "7215cb2e-d32d-4e9e-9973-5e48977d65aa"
      },

    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        " ---\n",
        "\n",
        "## 6. Business Insights\n",
        "- ICU and Oncology departments drive longer stays and higher billed amounts.\n",
        "- SecureLife insurer shows stricter claim approvals.\n",
        "- Patient demographics skew toward middle‑aged, urban populations.\n",
        "- Outliers in payment delays highlight insurer bottlenecks.\n",
        "\n",
        "---\n",
        "\n",
        "## 7. Conclusion\n",
        "The dataset is generally clean with manageable missing values and interpretable outliers. Provider rejection rates and departmental differences are key drivers of hospital financial risk. These engineered features are consolidated into `model_table.csv` for Phase 3 modeling.\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "E1-7G21ZSrJ6"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    }
  ]
}
